message:
test(e2e): add --robot-files command tests (ntm-zei3)

Add 6 E2E tests for the --robot-files TUI parity command:
- TestRobotFilesFlagParsing: Basic flag parsing and JSON structure
- TestRobotFilesTimeWindowFlag: Time window variations (5m, 15m, 1h, all)
- TestRobotFilesLimitFlag: --files-limit flag handling
- TestRobotFilesEmptySession: Non-existent session returns empty changes
- TestRobotFilesSummaryStructure: Summary JSON structure validation
- TestRobotFilesAgentHints: _agent_hints optional field behavior

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
